educational.degreeOther: Indian Certificate of Secondary Education (ICSE) Board

courses.description: Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT): Investigated IIoT applications in manufacturing, focusing on IT infrastructure, business value, and strategies for successful adoption, in a course developed in partnership with Siemens.

Completed a calculus-based study of classical mechanics, including kinematics, Newton’s laws, energy, momentum, rotation, and oscillations, emphasizing analytical reasoning and real-world applications.

CS50 Introduction to Programming with Python: Gained foundational knowledge in algorithms, loops, conditionals, functions, and data structures, developing computational thinking and programming skills through coding projects.

Entrepreneurship and Innovation: Examined how innovative ideas develop into sustainable ventures through coursework in market analysis, business modelling, and pitching, culminating in a collaborative start-up project.

courses.courseType: Georgia Institute of Technology, Online Course
courses.description: Introduction to Engineering Mechanics: An introduction to modelling and analysis of static equilibrium problems, with emphasis on applying calculus, physics, and vector principles to solve real-world engineering challenges.

Introduction to Artificial Intelligence: Studied core concepts of artificial intelligence (machine learning, deep learning, and neural networks) and built a generative AI solution for an organizational challenge integrating ethical principles.

awards.nameOfHonorReceived: The Tata Autocom System Prize for Science
The late JT Bajaj Prize for English
Certificate of Merit for Computer Science
2nd place for product and business pitch in 2025
awards.description: Won in a Shark Tank-style competition for a team developing two app prototypes—a gamified stock simulator and an AI-based skincare solution.

experiences.responsibilities: Conducted a study on the blown film extrusion process and assisted in sorting and categorizing post-industrial polymer waste, compiling data for environmental reporting. Accompanied senior executives to Germany and Italy to evaluate advanced extrusion lines and study biodegradable technologies that are suitable for hygiene and food-grade packaging. Tracked packed polymer waste across production lines to identify inefficiencies and recommend waste-mitigation strategies.

Trained in chassis, engine, brake, and suspension design within the Research & Development department, contributing to prototype development and design documentation. Assisted in crash and CAE simulation analysis to evaluate design performance and safety parameters. Observed Mercedes-Benz engine assembly and testing processes, gaining insight into combustion efficiency, durability testing, and performance optimization. Supported design modifications and learned about the company’s transition strategy toward electric vehicle (EV) manufacturing.

Gained hands-on experience in hospital sterile processing operations, including decontamination, tray assembly, and steam sterilization of surgical instruments. Managed handling and tracking of operating room trays, ensuring compliance with safety and hygiene protocols. Operated Building Automation Systems (BAS) to manage HVAC parameters and microbial control standards.

Shadowed the CTO to understand the bead wire manufacturing process and joined daily rounds to identify production challenges, improve process flow, and reduce material waste. Worked with Production Planning and Maintenance teams to study product cycles, energy-efficient methods, and PLC-based process control. Assisted in preparing quality assurance and production planning reports.
Monitored process parameters (temperature, pressure, flow) to ensure product quality consistency. Compiled operational data and presented a detailed report to the plant management team.

Shadowed production heads in the Ring Spinning and Open-End Spinning departments, gaining insight into traditional and rotor-based yarn manufacturing processes. Prepared production and efficiency reports analysing machine parameters, output quality, and performance.

extraCurricular.description: Led a team of 130+ students across academics, sports, and cultural events, promoting inclusivity and collaboration. Mentored juniors, organized inter-house competitions, and delegated responsibilities to vice-prefects.

extraCurricular.positionHeld: Team Leader and Mentor, Quiz Club
extraCurricular.awardsCertifications: Led the new team to an award at the Fr. George Hess Memorial Quiz.
extraCurricular.description: Represented the school at state and national-level quizzes, earning multiple awards. Trained and guided junior members through mock sessions and strategy workshops. Revived the club after transferring schools, leading the new team to an award at the Fr. George Hess Memorial Quiz.

extraCurricular.positionHeld: Secretariat and Co-President, Model United Nations Club
extraCurricular.description: Oversaw 150+ delegates as part of the Secretariat, mentoring new participants in research and debate. Led delegations to the Harvard Model United Nations Conferences in Bangalore and Dubai.

Captained the school team of 16 players at inter-school and state-level tournaments, starting as point guard. Trained with a professional coach in Toronto, attended a FIBA-certified camp (YUBAC, Serbia), and joined a skills camp led by U.S. coaches in Pune, India.
Taught English and Mathematics to underprivileged children to strengthen literacy and numeracy skills. Assisted in teaching basketball to underprivileged girls to promote confidence and teamwork.
Assisted in patient care and helped organize a blood donation camp at a local school. Proposed and presented an initiative to establish blood diagnostic camps for factory workers.

projects.title: Research Paper: A Study on Optimizing a Flexible Packaging Plant Using Building Automation Systems (BAS)
projects.description: Published in the American Journal of Student Research; analyzed methods to improve industrial efficiency and sustainability through BAS-driven energy optimization and downtime reduction.

projects.title: Shark Tank-style competition app prototypes
projects.description: Developed two app prototypes—a gamified stock simulator and an AI-based skincare solution—winning 2nd place for product and business pitch.
